summary: Retested AIAssistant (/assistant) after race condition fix. The previously reported React crash ('TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined reading content') is GONE. All three acceptance scenarios pass: (1) fresh page + suggestion chip click streams a reply with no error overlay; (2) reload restores prior history into [data-testid='assistant-messages']; (3) sending a new message after history-restore streams another reply successfully. No PAGEERROR or error-overlay elements detected during the entire run.

minor.issue: Chat history is persisted via db.chat_messages.insert_many() only AFTER the SSE stream finishes; if the client navigates away or reloads mid-stream, the partial assistant reply is lost. Acceptable for MVP but worth noting.

critical_code_review_comments: AIAssistant.jsx fix verified: useEffect history seed now uses setMessages(prev => prev.length===0 ? d.messages : prev) which prevents history overwriting in-flight stream state.

AIAssistant.jsx fix verified: delta/error/catch reducers now defensively guard last item with `if (!last || last.role !== 'assistant') push new assistant message` — eliminates the undefined.content crash.

server.py: chat persistence only happens after stream completes (insert_many runs in event_generator after the async-for loop). If the client disconnects mid-stream the partial reply is dropped. Consider periodic checkpointing for long replies.
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event handlers (carryover from iteration_1) — should migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers when convenient.
Suggestion chips now correctly carry data-testid='assistant-suggestion' — addressed from iteration_1 feedback.
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage session id 'TEST_retest_session_2026_01' for deterministic history-restore verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AIAssistant race condition is fixed and verified at 1920x800. Direct backend probe via in-page fetch('/api/assistant/history/TEST_retest_session_2026_01') returned status=200 with 2 messages after first send. No regression on streaming. No console PAGEERROR or class*='error' overlay observed. The whole IMEX AI app (backend pytest 10/10 + all frontend pages) is now green to ship.
rca of the issue: Original RCA from iteration_1 (race between getChatHistory seed and SSE deltas overwriting messages with empty []) has been remediated in src/pages/AIAssistant.jsx by (a) conditional history seeding only when local messages is empty, and (b) defensive guards in all three SSE reducers (delta/error/catch) that push a new assistant message if the last entry is missing or not an assistant message. Verified in browser with a deterministic session id: history persisted server-side, restored on reload, and subsequent sends continue to stream without throwing.
